title: What Is AI Pair Programming? AI Coding Tools for Developers
summary: IBM Technology presents an overview of AI pair programming and its applications in software development. The video covers how AI tools assist developers in debugging, code review, and improving productivity through AI-assisted coding practices.
writeup: IBM Technology explains AI pair programming, the practice of pairing developers with AI coding tools during software development. The video describes how these tools assist with debugging, code review, and code generation, with the goal of improving developer productivity through AI-assisted coding. It matters because it frames AI as a working partner across common development tasks rather than a single feature.
